data.title: Caswell™ Live Fire spins off from InVeris™, celebrates 100th anniversary. Founded in 1926, known for excellence in shooting range technology.
data.description: Atlanta-based company Caswell™ Live Fire, a renowned leader in shooting range design and services, has formally separated from its parent company InVeris™ as it celebrates its 100th anniversary since its establishment. The significant event signifies a fresh beginning for Caswell as it transitions into a phase of independence and advancement within the live fire technology sector. Founded in 1926, Caswell has been at the forefront of setting worldwide benchmarks for safety in shooting ranges. This move marks a new era for the company with a century-long history of excellence.

data.title: Innospec to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 17 after market close, conference call on Feb 18, ET 9:00 am with company executives.
data.description: Innospec Inc., a company listed under NASDAQ as IOSP, recently revealed its plan to unveil its earnings report for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 17, 2026. The announcement is slotted to occur after the market closes. Subsequently, on February 18, 2026, there will be an interactive conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET. This session will be hosted by Patrick S. Williams, the President and Chief Executive Officer, and Ian Cleminson, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Innospec Inc.

data.title: BridgeBio reveals Q4 2025 product revenue at $146M & full year at $362.4M at J.P. Morgan Conference. Milestones set for 2026.
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, preliminary unaudited figures show that net Attruby ® product revenue reached $146.0 million. Additionally, for the full year of 2025, the net product revenue is reported at $362.4 million.

data.title: Inventor from Las Cruces, N.M. creates DOOR LATCH SYSTEM to secure school doors in seconds during lockdown situation.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 12, 2026, an inventor from Las Cruces, New Mexico, shared insights on the need for improved safety measures during school lockdowns. The inventor introduced the innovative DOOR LATCH SYSTEM, aiming to provide a more effective method for teachers to quickly secure doors in emergency situations. This invention addresses critical seconds in lockdown scenarios and offers a potential solution to enhance security protocols.

data.title: Bitcoin whale from Satoshi era transfers $180M worth of BTC to Coinbase after 11 years, generating social media buzz.
data.description: For the first time in over a decade, a significant number of coins have been observed to be in motion, with the last recorded movement seen in the summer of 2010. This occurrence has generated buzz and conjecture on various social media platforms.

data.title: Zaelab enhances leadership team for B2B digital transformation projects, prioritizing Commerce, CPQ, and CRM direction.
data.description: Today, in Westport, Connecticut, Zaelab, a prominent consultancy specializing in business-to-business digital transformation, revealed key executive appointments. These appointments will enhance the leadership team as the firm broadens its efforts to develop top B2B Commerce, CPQ, and CRM solutions.

data.title: MySmile reveals 2026 Water Flosser Collection to promote daily water flossing for oral health. (Numbers: 3 new flossers)
data.description: In Los Angeles, on January 12, 2026, MySmile, a prominent player in the at-home oral care sector, introduces its latest range of water flossers for 2026. The collection includes the LP211, LP221, and LP233 Pro models, catering to the increasing need for dentist-endorsed daily water flossing. This move comes as part of the company's commitment to innovation and meeting customer demands for advanced oral care solutions.

data.title: Scorpion becomes a TikTok Marketing Technology Partner, enhancing SMB advertising efficiency. - SALT LAKE CITY, Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: The latest collaboration enhances Scorpion's capacity to assist small and medium-sized businesses in optimizing their advertising efforts on TikTok more intelligently and effectively. Based in Salt Lake City, on January 12, 2026, Scorpion, a prominent digital marketing and technology services provider for local enterprises, revealed its new partnership. This move is set to significantly impact the ability of SMBs to enhance their marketing strategies on TikTok, a popular social media platform.

data.title: Al in Clinical Workflow Market to reach $11.08 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 31.9% from $2.78 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 12, 2026, the Al in Clinical Workflow Market is forecasted by MarketsandMarkets™ to increase from approximately USD 2.78 billion in 2025 to USD 11.08 billion by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 31.9%. data.title: Major brands like Nike, IKEA, and BMW are using next-gen natural fibers, driving robust demand. Market report covers plant-based fibers, nanocellulose, etc.
data.description: Dublin - ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included "The Global Market for Next Generation Natural Fibers 2026-2036" in its offering. This report offers an in-depth analysis and projections for the fast-growing sustainable materials industry. It encompasses various plant-based fibers, nanocellulose, mycelium materials, regenerated cellulose, and bio-based substitutes for leather, silk, wool, down, and fur. The report covers market trends and forecasts for the period 2026-2036.

data.title: Valens Semiconductor to join investor conferences virtually; CFO to attend events for potential partnerships.
data.description: Valens Semiconductor (NYSE: VLN), a top provider of high-performance connectivity based in Hod Hasharon, Israel, reported on January 12, 2026, that their Chief Financial Officer, Guy Nathanzon, will be attending several investor events virtually. Notably, one of the events will be the Needham 28th Conference.

data.title: Marco's Pizza in Ohio assists customers in sticking to New Year's resolutions with affordable and healthy menu options, aiming to provide quality and value - catering to over 100 guests.
data.description: In Toledo, Ohio, on January 12, 2026, Marco's Pizza, a rapidly growing pizza franchise, is catering to customers' New Year's resolutions by offering a variety of menu options at everyday affordable prices. By providing flexible choices, the brand aims to make it convenient for guests to maintain a healthy eating lifestyle while also saving money.

data.title: AlphaTON Capital secures $46M for AI infrastructure to meet demand for confidential compute in the market.
data.description: AlphaTON Capital has successfully completed a $46 million funding round for expanding its AI infrastructure. The investment aims to meet the rising demand in the market for secure and confidential computing solutions.

data.title: Dow Jones fell due to Powell investigation; Abercrombie plunged while Nvidia wavered in stock market with live coverage.
data.description: The Dow Jones index experienced a decline in response to the investigation involving Federal Reserve Chair Powell. Abercrombie saw a significant drop in their stock value, while Nvidia showed fluctuations. The stock market today was characterized by these movements, with the Dow falling due to the Powell investigation. Additionally, a cybersecurity company showed a breakout. This live coverage provides updates on these events in the market.

data.title: DOJ's probe into Fed Chair Powell marks escalation in pressure for interest rate cuts amid admin's tactics.
data.description: The Justice Department's recent announcement to launch a criminal investigation into Jerome H. Powell, the chair of the Federal Reserve, represents a significant development in the efforts to push the central bank into reducing interest rates. This move marks a substantial escalation in the pressure being exerted on Powell and the Federal Reserve.
